name: TG FileStreamBot
description: Stream Telegram files to web with Mongo-backed signed links

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Optional for legacy forwarding mode. Set a channel ID if you want the old /stream/:messageID?hash flow. Use 0 for Mongo-only mode.

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB connection string for your movies collection

MONGO_COLLECTION.description: MongoDB collection name that stores file metadata

STREAM_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Secret key used to sign stream tokens (keep private)

HOST.description: Your public app URL. Example: https://your-app-name.herokuapp.com. Set this after app is created.

HASH_LENGTH.description: Custom hash length for generated URLs. The hash length must be greater than 5 and less than or equal to 32. Default to 6

USE_SESSION_FILE.description: Use session files for worker client(s). This speeds up the worker bot startups. default to false

USER_SESSION.description: A pyrogram session string for a user bot. Used for auto adding the bots to LOG_CHANNEL. Default to null
